auth.label: API Key
auth.description: RocketReach API key used with the Api-Key header. Generate it from your Account Settings.

actions.name: check_person_status
actions.description: Check the current status of one or more RocketReach person lookups.

anyOf.description: A RocketReach person identifier.
A RocketReach person numeric identifier.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for a RocketReach person status request.

items.description: An arbitrary JSON object returned by RocketReach.

people.description: A list of arbitrary JSON objects returned by RocketReach.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for this action.

account.description: An arbitrary JSON object returned by RocketReach.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for this action.

actions.name: get_company_funding
actions.description: Retrieve the revenue and funding-investor data exposed on a RocketReach company profile by looking up the target company first.

anyOf.description: The RocketReach company identifier or company domain.
The RocketReach company numeric identifier.

name.description: The company name to look up.

domain.description: The bare company domain to look up.

anyOf.description: The RocketReach company identifier, or null when it is not available.

The company website domain, or null when it is not available.
The RocketReach web profile URL, or null when it is not available.

The employee count returned by RocketReach, or null when it is not available.
The revenue value returned by RocketReach, or null.
The primary industry returned by RocketReach, or null when it is not available.

items.description: A funding investor item returned by RocketReach.

fundingInvestors.description: The funding investors returned by RocketReach.

actions.name: lookup_person
actions.description: Look up a RocketReach person profile by id, email, name, or LinkedIn URL through the official lookup endpoint.

email.description: The email address of the person to look up.

name.description: The name of the person to look up.

linkedin_url.description: The LinkedIn profile URL of the person to look up.

current_employer.description: The current employer to pair with a person-name lookup.

lookup_type.description: The RocketReach lookup type to request.

webhook_id.description: The RocketReach webhook identifier to associate with the request.

block.description: Whether RocketReach should block until the lookup completes when supported.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for a RocketReach person lookup request.

person.description: An arbitrary JSON object returned by RocketReach.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for this action.

actions.name: lookup_person_and_company
actions.description: Look up a RocketReach person profile and return any company profile embedded in the official lookup response.

email.description: The email address of the person to look up.

name.description: The name of the person to look up.

title.description: The job title to pair with the person lookup.

npi_number.description: The NPI number to use for a healthcare-focused lookup.

lookup_type.description: The RocketReach lookup type to request.

linkedin_url.description: The LinkedIn profile URL of the person to look up.

current_employer.description: The current employer to pair with the person lookup.

webhook_id.description: The RocketReach webhook identifier to associate with the request.

return_cached_emails.description: Whether RocketReach should return cached emails when they are available.

block.description: Whether RocketReach should block until the lookup completes when supported.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for a RocketReach person-and-company lookup request.

person.description: An arbitrary JSON object returned by RocketReach.

actions.name: search_companies
actions.description: Look up a company by exact name, domain, or id and return it as a single-item company list for search-style compatibility.

query.description: The exact company name to look up for compatibility.

name.description: The company name to look up.

domain.description: The bare company domain to look up.

limit.description: How many results to request per page.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for the RocketReach company search compatibility helper.

anyOf.description: The RocketReach company identifier, or null when it is not available.
The company display name, or null when it is not available.

actions.name: search_people
actions.description: Search RocketReach people with the official structured query object and pagination controls.

query.description: The official RocketReach people-search facet object, such as { name: ['Ada Lovelace'] } or { current_employer: ['OpenAI'] }.

limit.description: How many results to request per page.

options.description: Additional RocketReach search options merged into the top-level request body.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for a RocketReach people search request.

items.description: An arbitrary JSON object returned by RocketReach.

profiles.description: A list of arbitrary JSON objects returned by RocketReach.

anyOf.description: An arbitrary JSON object returned by RocketReach.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for this action.
